purpose: Bound the prior mockup reconciliation map under the 22 locked concept mockup proof and retention authority.
superseded_language: final revised mockup package incomplete until regenerated
supersession_rules: This file does not authorize new mockup generation.
This file does not authorize replacement of the 22 locked concept mockups.
This file does not authorize schematic boards, wireframes, or placeholder artifacts as user-review mockups.
This file may be used only for historical drift analysis and implementation guidance against the locked concept proof stack.
Any future mockup work requires explicit user authorization and must reference the 22 locked concept mockup proof and retention stack.
global_reconciliation_rules_retained_for: Preserve locked dark navy, black, gold, premium executive visual system.
Use approved DFW Matchday Concierge logo only.
Represent executive vehicles as a class, not a guaranteed make or model.
Show seven lanes: VIP, Team Family, Media / Corporate, Fan Hubs, Drivers, Concierges, Fulfillment.
Do not show official tournament, team, venue, federation, sponsor, or credential affiliation.
Do not imply live AI, live payment, live dispatch, live routing, automatic assignment, or guaranteed fulfillment.
Use operator-assisted, review required, confirmed scope required, and blocked status language where appropriate.
Premium private hubs remain ad-free unless explicitly approved. Public Fan Hub surfaces may show labeled ad/referral zones.
